channel.title: Markdown on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Markdown on yexca'Blog

item.title: Real-time Markdown Preview in VS Code
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by Gemini-3-flash Introduction After learning how to use Markdown , I’ve found it incredibly useful (all my recent posts are written in Markdown). Since I often work with Markdown for coding or building GitHub Pages , and VS Code is my go-to editor (for watching Diana), I looked for a way to enable real-time previews. Shortcuts Inside a Markdown file (.md), click into the editor window to focus it, then press CTRL+K followed by V. Note: make sure …

item.title: Markdown Basics (Learning Notes)
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash Introduction Recently, while building a cloud storage website , I learned about Markdown. This thing is super useful, so I’m writing up some learning notes. You can learn on the go with an online editor , or download a desktop editor . My preferred Markdown editor is Typora . For a quick refresh, check out the official Markdown Syntax Cheat Sheet . Headings To create a heading, just use # + space + heading text. There are six …
